title: Fix package reference not found type_id

features.name: parameterized class with default type parameter
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a type parameter that defaults to a base class type

features.name: scoped static member access through type parameter
features.description: Code should include a static member access through a parameterized type scope like T::member::method()

features.name: class typedef as self-referential type identifier
features.description: Code should include a class that typedefs its own type name as type_id, creating a self-referential type alias
